meta.title: Profit KÜ - Modern housing association management
meta.description: A simple app for board members, residents, and accounting.
hero.title: HOA invoices and meter readings in order without Excel and confusion.
hero.subtitle: Suitable for both large and small associations.
hero.trust: Associations across Estonia save hours every week.
hero.trust2: Readings directly from the resident's phone
hero.slides.1.caption: Flexible billing
hero.slides.1.alt: Flexible billing with multiple billing periods, custom fees, and billing rules.
hero.slides.2.caption: Dashboard
hero.slides.2.alt: Dashboard view with financial metrics, open tasks, and key monthly indicators.
hero.slides.3.caption: Resident portal
hero.slides.3.alt: Resident portal with meter readings, invoice history, and request tracking.
features.title: Why Profit KÜ?
features.subtitle: All the core features you need for housing association accounting. Everything necessary and nothing superfluous.
features.1.title: Invoices and payments
features.1.desc: Send invoices, split costs, and track incoming payments without additional spreadsheets.
features.2.title: Easy meter reading submission
features.2.desc: Residents can conveniently submit readings directly from their phone. We import all common meter reading formats.
features.3.title: Announcements
features.3.desc: Share important updates with all residents instantly.
features.4.title: Document vault
features.4.desc: Keep protocols, contracts, and files in one secure place.
features.5.title: Full-featured accounting
features.5.desc: All financial data in order and conveniently accessible.
features.6.title: Mobile friendly
features.6.desc: Works smoothly on phone, tablet, and desktop.
features.support.title: Our support is always ready to help
features.support.desc: Questions, problems or wishes? Our helpful, fast, and genuinely eager support is just a message away.
features.growth.title: The program grows with you
features.growth.desc: New features and improvements are constantly added to meet growing needs and make your work even easier.
audience.title: Who is it for?
audience.board.title: For HOA boards
audience.board.desc: Less manual work and a clearer overview of what is happening in the building and what needs attention.
audience.accountant.title: For accountants
audience.accountant.desc: Invoices, incoming payments, and financial data stay organized, with the right information easy to find.
audience.manager.title: For management companies / offices
audience.manager.desc: Manage multiple buildings in one view, get special pricing, and simplify the daily workflow.
how.title: How it works
how.1.title: Create your building profile
how.1.desc: Set up units, owners, and starting data in minutes.
how.2.title: Invite residents
how.2.desc: Send email invites and move communication into one channel.
how.3.title: Automate routines
how.3.desc: Billing, reminders, and reporting run on autopilot.
howtostart.title: How to get started
howtostart.1.title: Get in touch
howtostart.1.desc: Send us a short message or call us and let's discuss your building's needs. We'll see together how Profit KÜ can be used in your association.
howtostart.2.title: Make a plan
howtostart.2.desc: We'll create a plan on how to smoothly start using Profit KÜ. We'll get to know your specifics and needs and provide a clear overview of how to get everything running.
howtostart.3.title: Create the first invoices
howtostart.3.desc: We'll be there to support you throughout the entire process to ensure everything runs smoothly. We'll help, guide, teach, and also learn ourselves to make sure your experience is the best possible.
pricing.title: Simple and transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: 0.50 EUR per apartment per month.
pricing.notice.special: Special prices are available for accounting companies and management companies.
pricing.basic.name: Starter
pricing.pro.name: Growth
pricing.enterprise.name: Enterprise
testimonials.title: What customers say
testimonials.1.quote: Meeting prep now takes half the time.
testimonials.1.author: Marika, board member
testimonials.2.quote: Residents finally access all documents on their own.
testimonials.2.author: Andrus, property manager
testimonials.3.quote: Payments and reminders are now far more reliable.
testimonials.3.author: Kristi, accountant

faq.3.q: Do you offer a free trial?
faq.3.a: Yes, 3 months free with no long-term commitment.
